business_model: Acquires proven consumer software products (Evernote, Vimeo, WeTransfer, Eventbrite, AOL) and operates them for the long term
customers: Consumers and prosumers across a portfolio of subscription apps
description: Milan-based technology company that buys established digital products and improves their monetization and efficiency. IPO'd on Nasdaq July 1 2026 at $29/share ($18.4B); revenue $1.31B in 2025 (+95% YoY) and $601M in Q1 2026 (+132% YoY). Inputs below use disclosed figures where available; CAC/LTV are analyst assumptions (4x) as the company does not disclose them.
